text: I feel a quiet curiosity in this modern exhibition space. The bold colors and thoughtful displays suggest a celebration of research and development, and I am drawn to ponder the evolving relationship between humans and technology. Surrounded by clean glass, vibrant walls, and interactive elements, I feel both grounded and expanded—as if invited to step deeper into new worlds of thought and possibility. There is an energy here of learning and invention, tinged with a sense of communal searching for wisdom.
